theme: Linux navigatsiya — ish maydoni, hujjatlash, log triage

tasks.title: Ish maydonini tayyorla
tasks.why: Har real loyiha tartibli papka tuzilmasidan boshlanadi — keyin chalkashmaysan.
steps: Ishchi papkangga o't:  cd ~/devops/days/day-01/work  (yo'q bo'lsa: devops lab)
Bitta buyruqda 'project' va uning ichida src, logs, config papkalarini yarat (mkdir -p)

tasks.title: Serverni hujjatlashtir (inventory)
tasks.why: Ops'da birinchi ish — serverni hujjatlash: kim, qancha resurs, qaysi OS.
steps: Ichiga BUYRUQ orqali yoz (qo'lda emas): hostname, CPU yadrolar soni (nproc), OS (cat /etc/os-release | head -1)
Maslahat:  hostname >> ...  va  nproc >> ...  (>> qo'shib yozadi)
tasks.expect: host.txt ichida shu serverning hostname'i va yadrolar soni bor

tasks.title: Loglardan xatolarni ajrat (triage)
tasks.why: Tunda servis yiqildi — minglab logdan faqat ERROR'larni ajratib olish kunlik ish.
steps: ERROR qatorlarini ajratib yoz:  grep ERROR ~/devops/days/day-01/fixtures/app.log > project/logs/errors.txt
tasks.expect: errors.txt — fixturedagi ERROR qatorlari (boshqa hech narsa)

tasks.title: Audit — fayllarni sana
tasks.why: Inventarizatsiya: tizimda nechta shu turdagi fayl bor? find + wc — audit asbobi.
steps: ~/devops ichidagi BARCHA .md fayllar SONINI top (find + wc -l)

tasks.title: Disk holatini hujjatla
tasks.why: Disk to'lib qolsa servis o'ladi — disk holatini kuzatish kunlik ops ishi.
steps: root fayl tizimi holatini ko'r:  df -h /

tasks.title: Eng katta loglarni top
tasks.why: Disk to'lganda — qaysi log eng katta? Hajm bo'yicha saralash asosiy ko'nikma.
steps: Eng katta 3 ta nomni project/logs/biggest.txt ga yoz

tasks.title: Birinchi skript
tasks.why: DevOps = avtomatlashtirish. Hammasi kichik skriptdan boshlanadi.
steps: Ichiga matn chiqaradigan echo yoz (masalan: echo 'Salom, agent')

tasks.title: BOSS — 'Yashirin Arxiv' xazina ovi
tasks.why: Navigatsiya mahoratini to'liq sinash: ls -a → grep -r → find → tail.

tasks.title: Tushuntirib ber
tasks.why: Tushuntira olish — haqiqatan tushunganingning yagona isboti.
steps: Bugun o'rganganingni (navigatsiya, grep, find) 2 jumlada ustozga ayt
